user.title: Add a shutter
user.description: Add position tracking to a shutter or blind that does not report its position natively.

switches.title: Motor switches
switches.description: Pick the two switches (relays) that drive the shutter motor -- one for each direction.

cover.title: Source cover
cover.description: Pick the existing cover that this integration will add position tracking to.

timing.title: Travel times
timing.description: Measure how long your shutter takes to travel its full range. Use a stopwatch, from fully closed to fully open and vice versa.

data_description.travel_time_up: Seconds from fully closed to fully open.
data_description.travel_time_down: Seconds from fully open to fully closed.
data_description.motor_inertia: Seconds between sending a command and the motor actually starting to move. Set to 0 if the motor reacts instantly.
data_description.stop_method: Most devices accept a stop command directly. If yours does not (common with some Zigbee relays), choose 'Send direction again' instead -- it resends the current direction to toggle the motor off.

error.invalid_time: Travel time must be greater than zero seconds.

init.title: Adjust travel times
init.description: Fine-tune the timing if the shutter overshoots or stops short of the target position.

data_description.travel_time_up: Seconds from fully closed to fully open.
data_description.travel_time_down: Seconds from fully open to fully closed.
data_description.motor_inertia: Seconds between sending a command and the motor actually starting to move. Set to 0 if the motor reacts instantly.
data_description.stop_method: Most devices accept a stop command directly. If yours does not (common with some Zigbee relays), choose 'Send direction again' instead -- it resends the current direction to toggle the motor off.

error.invalid_time: Travel time must be greater than zero seconds.

options.switches: Two relay switches (one up, one down)

options.resend_direction: Send direction again to toggle off
